en: What causes quarrels and what causes fights among you? Is it not this, that your passions are at war within you?
zh: 你們中間的爭執和打鬥是從哪裡來的呢？不是從你們肢體中好鬥的私慾來的嗎？

en: You desire and do not have, so you murder. You covet and cannot obtain, so you fight and quarrel. You do not have, because you do not ask.
zh: 你們放縱貪慾，如果得不到，就殺人；你們嫉妒，如果一無所得，就打鬥爭執。你們得不到，因為你們不求；

en: You ask and do not receive, because you ask wrongly, to spend it on your passions.
zh: 你們求也得不到，因為你們的動機不良，要把所得的耗費在你們的私慾上。

en: You adulterous people! Do you not know that friendship with the world is enmity with God? Therefore whoever wishes to be a friend of the world makes himself an enemy of God.
zh: 淫亂的人哪，你們不知道與世俗為友，就是與 神為敵嗎？所以與世俗為友的，就成了 神的仇敵。

en: Or do you suppose it is to no purpose that the Scripture says, "He yearns jealously over the spirit that he has made to dwell in us"?
zh: 聖經說：“ 神愛他那安置在我們裡面的靈，愛到嫉妒的地步” ，你們想這話是徒然的嗎？

en: But he gives more grace. Therefore it says, "God opposes the proud, but gives grace to the humble."
zh: 但 神所賜的恩更大；所以聖經上說： “ 神抵擋驕傲的人， 賜恩給謙卑的人。”

en: Submit yourselves therefore to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you.
zh: 你們應當順服 神，抵擋魔鬼，魔鬼就逃避你們。

en: Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you. Cleanse your hands, you sinners, and purify your hearts, you double-minded.
zh: 你們應當親近 神， 神就親近你們。罪人啊，要潔淨你們的手；三心兩意的人哪，要清潔你們的心。

en: Be wretched and mourn and weep. Let your laughter be turned to mourning and your joy to gloom.
zh: 你們要愁苦、悲哀、哭泣，把歡笑變為傷痛，把快樂變為憂愁。

en: Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will exalt you.
zh: 你們務要在主面前謙卑，他就使你們高升。

en: Do not speak evil against one another, brothers. The one who speaks against a brother or judges his brother, speaks evil against the law and judges the law. But if you judge the law, you are not a doer of the law but a judge.
zh: 弟兄們，不要互相毀謗；人若毀謗弟兄，或判斷弟兄，就是毀謗律法、判斷律法了。如果你判斷律法，就不是實行律法的人，而是審判官了。

en: There is only one lawgiver and judge, he who is able to save and to destroy. But who are you to judge your neighbor?
zh: 立法的，審判的，只有一位，就是那能拯救人，也能毀滅人的 神；你這判斷鄰舍的，你是誰呢？

en: Come now, you who say, "Today or tomorrow we will go into such and such a town and spend a year there and trade and make a profit"-
zh: 你們說：“今天或明天，我們要到某城去，在那裡住一年，作生意賺錢。”

en: yet you do not know what tomorrow will bring. What is your life? For you are a mist that appears for a little time and then vanishes.
zh: 其實明天怎樣，你們並不知道。你們的生命是甚麼呢？你們本來是過眼雲煙，轉瞬之間就消逝了。

en: Instead you ought to say, "If the Lord wills, we will live and do this or that."
zh: 你們倒不如說：“主若願意，我們就可以活著，作這事或作那事。”

en: As it is, you boast in your arrogance. All such boasting is evil.
zh: 但現在你們竟然張狂自誇；這一切自誇，都是邪惡的。

en: So whoever knows the right thing to do and fails to do it, for him it is sin.
zh: 人若知道該行善事，卻不去行，這就是他的罪了。
